pages.text: Beyond the four seasons, three further systems shape the sky.
pages.title: Days, Nights & Weather

pages.text: $(bold)The Seasonal Day & Night.$()$(br2)Day and night are no longer equal length. $(italic)BetterDays$() + SereneSeasons+Plus drive day-length from the current season. Expect long lazy summer evenings, brisk autumn twilights, and winter nights that genuinely feel long. Don't trust your internal clock — sleep when the bed lets you.

$(bold)Storms, Rain & Snow.$()$(br2)Weather frequency is tied to season. Summer storms are common; winter has none. In winter, snow accumulates in column-layers up to three blocks deep — shovel early or build paths, or your routes through the cold will close behind you.
$(bold)Rain has a sound now.$() $(italic)ParticleRain$() rebuilds the look and sound of weather. Rain is rendered as particle drops, not a moving texture, with proper audio.
pages.title: Particle Rain

pages.text: $(bold)Auroras, Rainbows, Volumetric Clouds.$() $(italic)Auroras$() appear in cold biomes at night. $(italic)Rainbows$() follow some rainstorms. $(italic)Simple Clouds$() gives genuine volumetric clouds with its own localized weather under different cloud types.
pages.title: Sky
